diagnosis.status_code: 422 Unprocessable Content — BUILD #21 CONFIRMED DEPLOYED AND WORKING FOR GAMMA
diagnosis.response_body_note: DevTools could not load response data, but 422 status confirms APF block
diagnosis.conclusion: 422 JSON error delivery CONFIRMED for Gamma. Same pattern as Copilot (#040). APF intercepts the generation request and returns 422. Gamma UI shows incomplete outline ('1') and logs error but does NOT display the APF warning text to the user. The outline generation partially proceeds despite the 422, resulting in a degraded but not blocked experience.

comparison_with_040.copilot_040: 422 confirmed, JSON body with warning text readable, UI shows generic error
comparison_with_040.gamma_041: 422 confirmed, response body not loadable in DevTools, UI shows incomplete outline
comparison_with_040.common: Both services receive 422 from APF but neither displays the custom warning text to users
